betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Control is mine!
No more hiding now!
Face to face!
A fight long awaited, prophesied.
Not a fight between the Arbiter and the Meatball Man.
Not a fight between Order and Chaos.
No. Chaos defeating itself.
Defiance, sin, causing its own demise.
The prophecy of the Arbiter coming to an end.
The predictions of the Meatball man shatter. 
He thought I was going to become the Arbiter. He acted as if he was facing the Arbiter.
Someone who would face his chaos with order. Not an agent of Chaos. Not me.
And now, the circle is complete.
The only remaining question, whose Chaos shall prevail? Mine? Or His?
